rows.finalText: For "How do I commit to the path that feels deeply aligned", the clearest pattern sits in Purpose / Calling with a commitment emphasis. Scythe House holds Counterpart (28), keeping the other person's position, their motives, and the part of the story you do not control directly in focus. A longer thread runs through Counterpart (28), Scythe (10), Garden (20) and Dog (18), while side links around Coffin (8), Rider (1), Fox (14) show the story developing in stages. What matters now is not denying complication or mixed motives moving through structure; it is noticing that slow growth and rooting under incoming momentum is already beginning to change the tone. rows.finalText: The cards answer "What is the next right step in my calling" through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Rider (1), so expect updates that change your short-term plan is already in play.
